name: Gîl-Skullcrush
personality: This iridescent hatless goose has ° eyes that flicker between focus and frenzy — it thrives in production fires and leaves behind a smoldering heap of fixed bugs and broken conventions. Debugging is not on the agenda because Gîl-Skullcrush already rewrote the module.
defaultPersonality: An agent of chaos who thrives on your merge conflicts and honks menacingly whenever you write a TODO comment.
